examples: Yes, World Honoured One, the Tathagata possesses deva eyes.
Subhuti, what do you think? Does the Tathagata possess deva eye?
He is thus called a disciple of the noble ones undertaking the Deva-Uposatha.
The former Wales Under-17 international is a central midfielder who left the Deva Stadium last month.
But, as thing stands now, there seems little cause for similar optimism at the Deva Stadium.
